title: American Electric (AEP) Arm Gets Nod to Buy 999MW Clean Energy
text: American Electric's (AEP) unit Southwestern Electric Power wins the regulatory nod to acquire three clean energy projects with a total generation capacity of 999MW.

title: Louisiana Public Service Commission Approves SWEPCO Renewable Projects
text: SHREVEPORT, La. , June 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwestern Electric Power Co., an American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) company, has received approval by the Louisiana Public Service Commission (LPSC) to move forward with its fuel-free power plan to acquire up to 999 megawatts (MW) of renewable generation resources.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Hedge Against Rising Inflation
text: This volatile climate has left many investors squinting through the fog, searching for dividend stocks for an inflation hedge. It's been a rollercoaster ride for investors, a year brimming with unpredictability, especially concerning personal finances.

title: American Electric Power: The Dividends Are Overpriced
text: AEP's stock is valued using the Gordon Growth Model, which is suitable for dividend-paying firms in the mature growth phase that are relatively insensitive to the business cycle. AEP's fair value is estimated to be in the range of $47 to $83 per share, with the stock currently trading around $85 per share. Despite a strong track record of dividend payments, the high interest rate environment and large amount of outstanding debt make an investment in AEP's stock at current price less attractive.

title: High Yield Stock Watchlist: June 2023
text: There are 20 stocks on my high yield watchlist for June 2023. The majority of the stocks on my watchlist are undervalued based on dividend yield theory. An equally weighted portfolio of these stocks underperformed the Vanguard High Yield Dividend ETF by about 1.5% during the month of May.
